items.name: Ali Nazik
items.description: We proudly serve your choice of tender lamb or beef, paired with roasted eggplant, ripe tomato, creamy butter, fragrant garlic, and smooth yogurt.
items.simplified_description: Ali Nazik is a specialty from Gaziantep featuring roasted eggplants with lamb or beef.

items.name: Sarma
items.description: Tender grape leaves stuffed with rice and herbs — a classic Turkish dish.
items.simplified_description: Stuffed grape leaves with rice and herbs.

items.name: Hummus
items.description: Creamy chickpea dip blended with tahini, garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil. Smooth, rich, and perfect for dipping bread or pairing with any of our grilled dishes.
items.simplified_description: A smooth dip made from chickpeas, tahini, and garlic.

items.name: Tzatziki
items.description: A cool and creamy yogurt dip mixed with grated cucumber, garlic, and a touch of mint. Light, refreshing, and perfect as a side or dip.
items.simplified_description: A refreshing yogurt dip with cucumber and garlic.

items.name: Ezeme
items.description: A finely chopped Turkish salsa made with tomatoes, onions, peppers, parsley, and herbs, mixed with olive oil and a touch of spice. Fresh, tangy, and slightly zesty—perfect as a dip or a bold side to grilled meats.
items.simplified_description: A fresh salsa made with chopped vegetables and herbs.

items.name: Iskender Kebab
items.description: A beloved Turkish specialty featuring sliced doner kebab layered over pieces of warm pita, topped with savoury tomato sauce and a drizzle of melted butter. Rich, comforting, and a Turkish Classic.
items.simplified_description: Sliced doner kebab on pita with tomato sauce and butter.

items.name: Liver Kebab
items.description: Grilled liver served with bread, rice, and salad — a bold and traditional Turkish dish.
items.simplified_description: Grilled liver with bread, rice, and salad.

items.name: Turkish Donair
items.description: A hearty and flavour-packed meal featuring tender, thinly sliced Turkish doner served over fragrant rice. Paired with a crisp side salad, creamy hummus, tzatziki, and warm pita bread.
items.simplified_description: Thinly sliced doner on rice with salad and dips.

items.name: Adana Kebab
items.description: A bold and spicy Turkish classic made from hand-minced beef and lamb, seasoned with traditional spices, and grilled on skewers over open flame. Served with rice, salad, hummus, tzatziki, and warm pita bread.
items.simplified_description: Spicy minced beef and lamb kebab on skewers.

items.name: Chicken Kebab
items.description: Juicy, marinated chicken cubes grilled over open flame for a smoky, tender finish. Served with seasoned rice, fresh salad, creamy hummus, cool tzatziki, and warm pita bread.
items.simplified_description: Grilled marinated chicken served with rice and salad.

items.name: Eggplant Platter
items.description: Oven-roasted eggplant filled with your choice of: Vegetarian: a savoury mix of seasonal vegetables in a rich tomato sauce. Beef & Veggie: ground beef simmered with vegetables and Turkish spices. Served with rice, fresh salad, creamy hummus, and tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Roasted eggplant filled with vegetables or beef.

items.name: Beyti Kebab
items.description: Grilled ground beef kebab (Adana) wrapped in lavash bread, sliced and served over a bed of rice. Topped with savory tomato sauce and a drizzle of yogurt, and finished with melted butter.
items.simplified_description: Ground beef kebab wrapped in bread and served with rice.

items.name: Sultan's Choice
items.description: A royal platter featuring juicy lamb kebab and tender chicken kebab, served with fragrant rice, fresh salad, creamy hummus, tzatziki, and warm pita bread.
items.simplified_description: A platter with lamb and chicken kebabs served with rice.

items.name: Family Platter
items.description: Rack of lamb, steak, Adana, lamb, and chicken kebabs — served with rice and salad.
items.simplified_description: A large platter with various meats served with rice.

items.name: Rack of Lamb
items.description: Succulent lamb chops grilled to perfection with Turkish spices, delivering a juicy, tender bite every time. Served with seasoned rice, fresh salad, creamy hummus, and cool tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Grilled lamb chops served with rice and salad.

items.name: Lamb Shoulder Special
items.description: Tender lamb shoulder served over a bed of rice, garnished with grilled tomatoes, red onions, and fresh herbs. Accompanied by flatbread and a side of mixed salads.
items.simplified_description: Lamb shoulder served with rice and garnishes.

items.name: Stuffed Chicken
items.description: Chicken filled with rice and herbs. Served with rice and fresh salad.
items.simplified_description: Chicken stuffed with rice and herbs served with salad.

items.name: Lamb Shank
items.description: Slow-cooked, fall-off-the-bone lamb shank simmered in a rich blend of Turkish herbs and spices. Served with fragrant rice, fresh salad, creamy hummus, and cool tzatziki.
items.simplified_description: Slow-cooked lamb shank served with rice and salad.

items.name: Friends Platter
items.description: A combination of grilled meats, including chicken, beef, and lamb, served with roasted tomatoes, onions, and pita bread on a bed of seasoned rice.
items.simplified_description: A mixed grill platter with various meats served with rice.

items.name: Mixed Grill
items.description: Adana, lamb & chicken kebabs. Served with rice and salad.
items.simplified_description: A mix of Adana, lamb, and chicken kebabs served with rice.

items.name: Turkish Tea
items.description: Traditional Turkish black tea served hot in a tulip glass.
items.simplified_description: Hot traditional Turkish black tea.

items.name: Samaver Tea
items.description: Traditional Turkish tea, brewed in a samaver and served hot. Serves 5.
items.simplified_description: Hot Turkish tea brewed in a special pot, serves 5.

items.name: Turkish Coffee
items.description: A special brewing method where coffee is ground fine like cocoa, mixed with sugar (optional), and slowly brewed. Served with Turkish Delights.
items.simplified_description: Finely ground coffee brewed slowly, served with sweets.

items.name: Roasted Beef Pide
items.description: Our baked flatbread topped with generous pieces of savory, roasted beef and melted cheese. A hearty, flavorful choice with deep, concentrated flavors.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread topped with roasted beef and cheese.

items.name: Pastirmali Pide
items.description: Crispy flatbread topped with pastrami and melted cheese — a bold and tasty Turkish pizza.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread topped with pastrami and cheese.

items.name: Sujuk Pide
items.description: Turkish flatbread topped with mild beef sujuk sausage and melted cheese, baked until perfectly golden.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread topped with beef sausage and cheese.

items.name: Kiymali Pide
items.description: Flatbread with ground beef and vegetables — a classic Turkish pizza full of flavor.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread topped with ground beef and vegetables.

items.name: Lahmacun - Meat Pie
items.description: A thin, crispy flatbread topped with a flavorful mix of ground beef, tomatoes, onions, herbs, and spices. Served with fresh parsley, onions, and lemon on the side.
items.simplified_description: Crispy flatbread with ground beef and spices.

items.name: Cheese Pide
items.description: A Turkish flatbread filled with rich, melty kaşar cheese and baked until golden and bubbly.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread filled with melted cheese.

items.name: Veggie Pide
items.description: Veggie Pide: Bell Peppers, Onion, Tomato, Mushroom, Cheese, Spinach.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread topped with various vegetables and cheese.

items.name: Kunafa
items.description: Sweet cheese pastry. Kunafa is a traditional Middle Eastern dessert made with shredded phyllo dough, filled with sweet cheese or cream, baked until golden, and soaked in sugar syrup.
items.simplified_description: A sweet pastry filled with cheese and soaked in syrup.

items.name: Rice pudding (Sutlac)
items.description: Baked short grain rice and milk — a light and creamy Turkish dessert.
items.simplified_description: A light and creamy rice and milk dessert.

items.name: Baklava (Classic walnut) 1 lb
items.description: Layers of phyllo with pistachios or nuts, baked and sweetened with syrup.
items.simplified_description: Layers of pastry with nuts and syrup.

items.name: Pistachio Baklava
items.description: Made with Antep pistachios, known for their distinct rich flavor, thin layers of dough are filled with crushed nuts, baked, and then soaked in syrup.
items.simplified_description: Baklava made with rich Antep pistachios.

items.name: Carrot Slice Baklava
items.description: Offers a unique taste that combines rich flavors with pistachios.
items.simplified_description: Baklava with a unique flavor and pistachios.

items.name: Dilber Baklava
items.description: Crafted with ultra-thin layers of dough, it features premium Antep pistachios.
items.simplified_description: Baklava made with very thin layers and premium pistachios.

items.name: Midye Baklava
items.description: Made from a combination of first-class ingredients and semolina cream.
items.simplified_description: Baklava made with high-quality ingredients and cream.

items.name: Tulumda Dessert
items.description: Traditionally made to thrill those missing the traditional Turkish experience.
items.simplified_description: A traditional Turkish dessert.

items.name: Lamb Delight
items.description: A Turkish dessert that is rich and decadent.
items.simplified_description: A rich and indulgent Turkish dessert.

items.name: Kol Borek / Puff pastry
items.description: Spinach & cheese or ground beef.
items.simplified_description: Puff pastry filled with spinach and cheese or ground beef.

items.name: Kavurma
items.description: Sausage and cheese flatbread/Turkish Pizza.
items.simplified_description: Flatbread topped with sausage and cheese.

items.name: Menemen
items.description: Mixed veggies and eggs.
items.simplified_description: A dish made with mixed vegetables and eggs.

items.name: Breakfast Platter
items.description: Pide, feta, clotted cream and honey, simit, Kol Borek, olives, veggies, fruits, and molasses.
items.simplified_description: A large breakfast platter with various items.
